overview: Imperidome is a production-grade SaaS platform for business and client management on the Internet Computer blockchain. It features a full Admin Panel, Client Portal, and public website with CRM, financial tools, content management, and now fully editable questionnaire forms for all 16 product types.
features: Dynamic questionnaire editor for 16 product types
Admin can edit every question label, type, and option
Client portal renders forms from live backend definitions
8 Custom Build + 5 Speedy Site + 3 Ads/Services questionnaire types
Graceful fallback to hardcoded questions if none configured
All question definitions persisted across canister upgrades
